description: Input event sequence for Kotoba TTS bidirectional streaming

events._comment: Step 1: Configure session (must be the first client message, sent within WS_OPEN_TIMEOUT = 10s)
Step 2: Start a synthesis response (can be repeated after each response.done to reuse the session)
Step 4: Signal end of text input; the server will emit a final audio.chunk (isFinal=true) and response.done

output_audio_format_specs.transport: Base64-encoded little-endian bytes carried in audio.chunk.audio
